• U.S. and Puerto Rico customers.
  • Postpaid Individual and Special accounts only.
  • Account types: IA/IF/IG/IJ/IM/IR/S6/SC/SD/SE/SI/SK/ST/SV/SY

table.text: Before adding this plan, understand that the customer must ALSO purchase a new device on EIP to get the Yearly Upgrade benefit. Follow the Yearly Upgrade process to ensure the customer receives the Yearly Upgrade benefit. To add the plan to an account, add a Plan SOC + add an AAL SOC (for lines 3-8 and 10-12) + add a Data SOC (to all lines).

text_copy.text:
• If the customer has any retired features or previous plan benefits (such as Music Freedom, Binge On, or Data Stash), those are not included with this plan.
  • Customers can upgrade Netflix for an additional cost. 
  • Changing to a data feature with additional hotspot will reset the hotspot bucket.

text.text:
Refer to current discounts and a specific promo page for plan eligibility. Items on this page are not intended to be a complete list of offers and discounts. 

  • Customers on this plan will be eligible to have us pay off the remainder of their EIP when they trade in their phone after being on the EIP for 6+ months and paying off at least 50% of their phone. Yearly Upgrade stacks with our Same as New device offers.   
  • If the customer has existing promotional lines or service credits, check the specific promotion to ensure this plan is eligible.
